realtime_memories.content: Conda env: always use conda install (not pip) in base env. Obsidian MCP: Vault at ~/obsidian-vault (bind-mount from C:/.../Programming Vault). Folder: ' Claude Notes (MCP Server)' (leading space). CLAUDE.md architecture: ~/CLAUDE.md universal, project-specific CLAUDE.md in each root. Custom skills: /resume, /pipeline, /checkpoint. Alias: cq='claude -p'. LF line endings for shell scripts in WSL2.

dashboard_interface_project: ~/projects/dashboard_interface_project/. FastAPI + SQLAlchemy async + React/TS/Vite. Conda env: dashboard-backend. Domain: B&R Capital multifamily RE (Cabana on 99th + Tempe Metro = owned properties, 15 CoStar Submarket Clusters). Proforma files at C:/Users/MattBorgeson/B&R Capital/... (WSL2). Dev command: npm run dev:all. Login: matt@bandrcapital.com / Wildcats777!!. Auth: JWT via authStore (fetch client), backend RBAC guards (require_viewer/analyst/manager/admin). Tests: vitest (frontend) + pytest with SQLite in-memory (backend). auto_auth fixture in conftest.py for auth-protected endpoint tests. Axios fully removed (1f3fad1). DB: postgresql://postgres:postgres123@localhost:5432/dashboard_interface_data.

Key codebase patterns: (1) Zod schemas parse snake_case → camelCase (backendDealSchema in src/lib/api/schemas/deal.ts). (2) _enrich_deals_with_extraction() adds ~26 fields from ExtractedValue table. (3) SQLite tests need explicit created_at/updated_at (no server_default). (4) All datetime: datetime.now(UTC). (5) StrEnum + SQLAlchemy: use values_callable AND native_enum=False when DB column is varchar (not PG enum). (6) Zod: .nullable().optional() + ?? undefined (NOT ?? 0). (7) ONE API client: src/lib/api/client.ts (fetch). Convenience wrappers in src/lib/api/index.ts. (8) Mock extract_from_file with **kw to accept validate kwarg. (9) QueryClient singleton in src/lib/queryClient.ts, provided in main.tsx. (10) Token blacklist uses async Redis with lazy _ensure_redis() init. (11) asyncpg is STRICT about types — passing string to INTEGER column causes DataError. (12) Redis state persists between test runs — auth tests need autouse fixture to flush rl:*, blacklist:*, user_revoked:* keys. Token blacklist unit tests must monkeypatch REDIS_URL='' to force memory-only mode. (13) Frontend pageSize must not exceed backend Query(le=N) constraints. (14) Pydantic serializes Decimal as string — Zod price fields use z.union([z.string(), z.number()]).nullable(). (15) Always use safeParse (not parse) when mapping arrays. (16) Sidebar uses /properties/dashboard (not /deals). (17) /deals/kanban endpoint is separate from /deals list.

Dashboard status (2026-03-26): HEAD at 79b002f on main. ~3,325 backend + ~1,312 frontend = ~4,637 total tests. Architecture Review v3 complete (41 recommendations). Tech debt remediation merged to main (62/76 items, 5 waves). Recent work: security vuln patches (jsPDF, flatted), corrupt XLSB/XLSX handling, SharePoint auto-sync deal stages, UI fixes (submarket count, React Query refetch, Zod None coercion, yearBuilt N/A, portfolio KPI zero filtering). Next: Sprint 1 — UR-001 (Redis) and UR-007 (unified stage mapping), then extract 28 ungrouped files, production hosting.

MF Market Ranking: ~/projects/mf_market_ranking. Phase 1 enhancement IN PROGRESS (2026-03-18). Conda env: mf_market_rankings (recreated, pandas 2.2.x required — 3.x breaks freq aliases). 556 tests passing. Added: FEMA NRI loader, Tax Foundation loader. Next: Phase 2 (Class B differentiation), Phase 3 (Monte Carlo). DO NOT TOUCH: ensemble weights, training pipeline.

User prefers: transparent honest feedback over diplomatic hedging, understanding optimal tools before adding complexity. Commit style: conventional commits (feat/fix/refactor/test/chore with scope). USE AGENT TEAMS for parallel debugging — user explicitly and repeatedly requests this approach.
